title: frame_write can serialize inconsistent MIC length metadata
description: Why this issue exists: lichen_frame_write validates frame->mic_len but derives the serialized MIC length from frame->mic_length, so inconsistent fields can make it copy the wrong number of MIC bytes and leak uninitialized bytes. What needs to be done: require frame->mic_len to match frame->mic_length or serialize from one canonical field.
close_reason: Reject inconsistent MIC metadata in frame serialization and cover with focused frame test
